idea-plugin.name: TestGen
idea-plugin.description:
TestGen — Intelligent JUnit Test Generator powered by GitHub Copilot.

Automatically generates comprehensive JUnit test classes for your Java code by leveraging GitHub Copilot's AI capabilities. TestGen analyzes your source class, detects your project's test framework (JUnit 4/5, Mockito, Spring Boot Test), and injects a rich, structured prompt into Copilot Chat to generate tests covering all use cases.

Features:
  • Auto-detects JUnit 4/5, Mockito, Spring Boot Test from pom.xml or build.gradle
  • Analyzes source class structure via PSI (methods, fields, annotations)
  • Pre-populates test package and class name
  • Optional description field for additional test context
  • Scaffolds the test file in the correct test source root
  • Injects a structured prompt directly into GitHub Copilot Chat
Requirements:
  • GitHub Copilot plugin must be installed and authenticated
  • Java project with Maven (pom.xml) or Gradle (build.gradle)
idea-plugin.change-notes:
1.0.0
  • Initial release
  • Support for JUnit 4/5 auto-detection
  • Support for Maven and Gradle projects
  • GitHub Copilot Chat integration via prompt injection

action.description: Generate a JUnit test class for the current Java file using GitHub Copilot
Generate a JUnit test class for the current Java file using GitHub Copilot
